ogTitle: Lauriston vs Lavers Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lauriston and Lavers Hill.
heading: Lauriston vs Lavers Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lauriston, Victoria and Lavers Hill, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lauriston has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Lavers Hill (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lauriston or Lavers Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lauriston has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Lavers Hill scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lauriston scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Lavers Hill scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lauriston or Lavers Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lauriston has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
